overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt path through a sunlit grassy meadow with scattered oak trees. The character passes a wooden signpost and encounters a horse rider in a serene rural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with dirt path and scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass toward a distant signpost

notable_agents.action: horse standing in the grass near the tree line on the left side of the path

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt trail winding through tall green grass
large oak tree with dense green foliage casting shadows
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path through a sunlit meadow. A horse stands near the trees on the left, while distant mountains rise on the horizon. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a wooden signpost in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: path junction with wooden directional signpost

events.description: rider on brown horse approaches from the left and passes across the path
character passes the weathered wooden signpost at the path junction

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as a horse rider passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse across the path from left to right

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with directional arrow signs pointing different directions

segments.scene_description: At the path junction, a rider on horseback crosses from left to right in front of the character. The character passes a wooden signpost with directional arrows before continuing on the main trail. The standing horse previously seen is no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail ascending toward tree line

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the dirt path toward the tree line on the horizon

entered.detail: rolling green hills with patches of wildflowers and tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the gently sloping hill on the dirt path. The signpost falls behind as the trail leads through open grassland toward a distant tree line. The landscape opens up with rolling hills visible ahead under the clear morning sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transitions from a sheltered meadow into an expansive, open hillside. It begins by following the character from behind through a sunlit meadow, passing a horse standing near a cluster of trees with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character reaches a path junction, a rider on horseback crosses the trail from left to right just before the camera passes a wooden directional signpost. The scene then shifts as the character ascends a gently sloping hill, leaving the signpost behind while the terrain opens up into rolling grasslands. Finally, the path leads toward a distant tree line under a clear morning sky, expanding the view across the wide rural landscape.
